entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 11 (1d12 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the couatl's next turn.

actions.name: Constrict
entries: *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 15, one Medium or smaller creature the couatl can see within 5 feet. *Failure:* 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The crab can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 2 Necrotic damage.

traits.name: Hold Breath
entries: The crocodile can hold its breath for 1 hour.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12). While Grappled, the target has the Restrained condition.

actions.name: Ritual Sickle
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 1 Necrotic damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Light, Thaumaturgy
1/day: Hold Person
2/day: Command

spellcasting.name: Spiritual Weapon (2/Day)
entries: The cultist casts the Spiritual Weapon spell, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
2/day: Spiritual Weapon

actions.name: Pact Blade
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Thaumaturgy
1e/day: Jallarzi's Storm of Radiance (level 7 version), Mass Suggestion

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three attacks, using Pact Blade or Radiant Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Pact Blade
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Radiant Ray
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +9, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 31 (4d12 + 5) Radiant damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cyclops casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
1/day: Legend Lore
2e/day: Arcane Eye, Detect Magic, Locate Object

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cyclops makes three attacks, using Radiant Strike or Flash of Light in any combination.

actions.name: Radiant Strike
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 22 (3d10 + 6) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Flash of Light
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +10, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 17 (2d10 + 6) Radiant damage, and the target has Disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of the cyclops's next turn.

reactions.name: Portent 4
entries: The cyclops or an ally it can see makes a D20 Test. {@actResponse The cyclops rolls 1d20 and chooses whether to use that roll in place of the d20 rolled for the D20 Test.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cyclops makes two attacks, using Stone Club or Rock in any combination.

actions.name: Stone Club
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 16 (3d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Rock
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +9, range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 22 (3d10 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

reactions.name: Limited Foresight
entries: A creature the cyclops can see makes an attack roll against it. {@actResponse The cyclops imposes Disadvantage on the roll, and the cyclops gains Advantage on attack rolls against the target until the end of the cyclops's next turn.

name: Dao
speed: walk 30 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 30 ft. (hover) (hover)

traits.name: Earth Glide
entries: The dao can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dao doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

traits.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the dao dies outside the Elemental Plane of Earth, its body dissolves into dirt, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Earth.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dao has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Wishes
entries: The dao has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the dao knows it, the dao can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the dao can understand. If the dao casts the spell for the creature, the dao suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the dao has cast it three times, the dao can't do so again for 365 days.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dao casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Stone Shape
1e/day: Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Move Earth, Passwall, Plane Shift, Tongues, Wall of Stone

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dao makes three Earthen Maul attacks or two Earth Burst attacks.

actions.name: Earthen Maul
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 20 (4d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Earth Burst
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +10, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. Earth explodes from the target's space, creating the following effect. *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 16, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from and including the target. *Failure:* 10 (3d6) Thunder damage.

actions.name: Crush
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage, and the darkmantle attaches to the target. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the darkmantle had Advantage on the attack roll, it covers the target, which has the Blinded condition and is suffocating while the darkmantle is attached in this way.

While attached to a target, the darkmantle can attack only the target but has Advantage on its attack rolls. Its Speed becomes 0, it can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed, and it moves with the target.

A creature can take an action to try to detach the darkmantle from itself, doing so with a successful DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. On its turn, the darkmantle can detach itself by using 5 feet of movement.

actions.name: Darkness Aura (1/Day)
entries: Magical Darkness fills a 15-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the darkmantle. This effect lasts while the darkmantle maintains Concentration on it, up to 10 minutes. Darkvision can't penetrate this area, and no light can illuminate it.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Speak with Dead, Thaumaturgy

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three attacks, using Dread Scythe or Deathly Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Dread Scythe
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage, and the target can't regain Hit Points until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Deathly Ray
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 22 (4d10) Necrotic damage.

bonusActions.name: Spirit Wail 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 14, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the cultist. *Failure:* 14 (4d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn. *Success:* Half damage only.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The death dog makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 12. *Failure 1:* The target has the Poisoned condition. While Poisoned, the target's Hit Points maximum doesn't return to normal when finishing a Long Rest, and it repeats the save every 24 hours that elapse, ending the effect on itself on a success. Subsequent Failures: The Poisoned target's Hit Points maximum decreases by 5 (1d10).

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the death knight fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The death knight has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Marshal Undead
entries: Undead creatures of the death knight's choice (excluding itself) in a 60-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from it have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the death knight is destroyed before it atones for its evil, it gains a new body in 1d10 days, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in a location significant to the death knight.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The death knight casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):
At will: Command, Phantom Steed
2e/day: Destructive Wave (Necrotic), Dispel Magic

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The death knight makes three Dread Blade attacks.

actions.name: Dread Blade
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +11, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Hellfire Orb 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 18, each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect] centered on a point the death knight can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 35 (10d6) Fire damage plus 35 (10d6) Necrotic damage. *Success:* Half damage.

reactions.name: Parry
entries: The death knight is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse The death knight adds 6 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

legendaryActions.name: Dread Authority
entries: The death knight uses Spellcasting to cast Command. The death knight can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Fell Word
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 18, one creature the death knight can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 17 (5d6) Necrotic damage, and the target's Hit Points maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken. *Success or Failure:* The death knight can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Lunge
entries: The death knight moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Dread Blade attack.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The aspirant has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Marshal Undead
entries: Undead creatures of the aspirant's choice (excluding itself) in a 60-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from it have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The aspirant casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Phantom Steed
1e/day: Destructive Wave (Necrotic), Dispel Magic

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The aspirant makes three Dread Blade attacks.

actions.name: Dread Blade
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Hellfire Orb 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 15, each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect] centered on a point the aspirant can see within 120 feet of itself. *Failure:* 21 (6d6) Fire damage plus 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage. *Success:* Half damage.

reactions.name: Parry
entries: The aspirant is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse The aspirant adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

name: Death Slaad
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 18

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: The slaad regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Points.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The slaad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Invisibility (self only), Mage Hand, Major Image
1e/day: Blight (level 8 version), Cloudkill (level 6 version), Fly, Plane Shift, Tongues

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The slaad makes two Chaos Blade attacks.

actions.name: Chaos Blade
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 11 (1d12 + 5) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. Until the start of the slaad's next turn, the target has a condition determined by rolling 1d4: on a 1, Charmed; on a 2, Frightened; on a 3, Poisoned; or on a 4, Incapacitated.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The slaad shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the death tyrant fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The death tyrant uses Eye Rays three times.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 5 feet. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Eye Rays
entries: The death tyrant randomly shoots one of the following magical rays at a target it can see within 120 feet of itself (roll 1d10; reroll if the death tyrant has already used that ray during this turn):

- 1: Charm Ray
- 2: Paralyzing Ray
- 3: Fear Ray
- 4: Slowing Ray
- 5: Enervation Ray
- 6: Telekinetic Ray
- 7: Sleep Ray
- 8: Petrification Ray
- 9: Disintegration Ray
- 10: Death Ray

bonusActions.name: Negative Energy Cone
entries: The death tyrant's central eye emits an imperceptible, magical wave of negative energy in a 150-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. Creatures in that area can't regain Hit Points until the start of the death tyrant's next turn. An intact Humanoid corpse there instantly rises as a Zombie under the death tyrant's control and takes its turn immediately after the death tyrant on the same initiative count.

legendaryActions.name: Chomp
entries: The death tyrant makes two Bite attacks.

legendaryActions.name: Glare
entries: The death tyrant uses Eye Rays.

traits.name: Agile
entries: The deer doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Ram
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the demilich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the demilich is destroyed, it reforms and regains all its Hit Points in 1d10 days unless a Wish spell is cast on its remains.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The demilich makes three Necrotic Burst attacks.

actions.name: Necrotic Burst
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +11, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 24 (7d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Howl 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 19, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the demilich. *Failure:* 70 (20d6) Psychic damage. *Success or Failure:* The target has the Frightened condition until the start of the demilich's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Energy Drain
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 19, one creature the demilich can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* The target's Hit Points maximum decreases by 14 (4d6). *Success or Failure:* The demilich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Grave-Dust Flight
entries: The demilich flies up to its Fly Speed, shedding grave dust. Each creature within 5 feet of the demilich as it moves is targeted once by the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 19. *Failure:* The target has the Blinded condition until the end of the demilich's next turn. *Success or Failure:* The demilich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Necrosis
entries: The demilich makes one Necrotic Burst attack.

traits.name: Exalted Restoration
entries: If the deva dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The deva has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The deva casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Detect Evil and Good, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell)
1e/day: Commune, Raise Dead

spellcasting.name: Divine Aid (2/Day)
entries: The deva casts Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
2/day: Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, Remove Curse

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The deva makes two Holy Mace attacks.

actions.name: Holy Mace
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The wolf has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d10 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The worg has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The worg makes three Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the worg's next turn. While Poisoned, the target can't regain Hit Points.

actions.name: Dreadful Howl 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 16, each creature within 30 feet that isn't a worg. *Failure:* 36 (8d8) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the worg's next turn. *Success:* Half damage only.

bonusActions.name: Warp Step
entries: The worg teleports, along with a willing creature of its choice within 5 feet of it, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

traits.name: Avoidance
entries: If the displacer beast is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Displacement
entries: Attack rolls against the displacer beast have Disadvantage, since it projects an illusion that makes it appear to be near its actual location. This trait is suppressed while the displacer beast has the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The displacer beast makes one Rend attack and one Tentacle attack.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 feet. *Hit:* 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage. If target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Tentacle
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 10 feet. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the djinni dies outside the Elemental Plane of Air, its body dissolves into mist, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Air.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The djinni has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Wishes
entries: The djinni has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the djinni knows it, the djinni can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the djinni can understand. If the djinni casts the spell for the creature, the djinni suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the djinni has cast it three times, the djinni can't do so again for 365 days.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The djinni casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic
2e/day: Create Food and Water (can create wine instead of water), Tongues, Wind Walk
1e/day: Creation, Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The djinni makes three attacks, using Storm Blade or Storm Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Storm Blade
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 5 feet. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Lightning damage.

actions.name: Storm Bolt
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +9, range 120 feet. *Hit:* 13 (3d8) Thunder damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Create Whirlwind
entries: The djinni conjures a whirlwind at a point it can see within 120 feet. The whirlwind fills a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high Cylinder [Area of Effect] centered on that point. The whirlwind lasts until the djinni's Concentration on it ends. The djinni can move the whirlwind up to 20 feet at the start of each of its turns.

Whenever the whirlwind enters a creature's space or a creature enters the whirlwind, that creature is subjected to the following effect. *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 17 (a creature makes this save only once per turn, and the djinni is unaffected). *Failure:* While in the whirlwind, the target has the Restrained condition and moves with the whirlwind. At the start of each of its turns, the Restrained target takes 21 (6d6) Thunder damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

spellcasting.name: Read Thoughts
entries: The doppelganger casts Detect Thoughts, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12).
At will: Detect Thoughts

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The doppelganger makes two Slam attacks and uses Unsettling Visage if available.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6 (with Advantage during the first round of each combat), reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Unsettling Visage
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the doppelganger that can see the doppelganger. *Failure:* The target has the Frightened condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The doppelganger shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

name: Dracolich
speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 80 ft.
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 24

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dracolich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Life Suppression
entries: Creatures within 60 feet of the dracolich can't regain Hit Points.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dracolich has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Soul Gem
entries: The dracolich has a magical gem. If the dracolich is destroyed while the gem is on the same plane of existence as it, the dracolich gains a new body in 1d20 days, regaining all its Hit Points and appearing within 5 feet of the gem.

The gem is a Tiny object that has AC 20; HP 50; and Immunity to Necrotic, Poison, and Psychic damage. The gem regains all its Hit Points at the end of every turn, but it turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points. If the gem is destroyed, the dracolich can create a new one by completing an 8-hour ritual using a gem worth 1,000+ GP and by expending 5,000 GP, which the ritual consumes.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dracolich casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 19, +11 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Detect Magic, Ray of Sickness (level 2 version)
1e/day: Create Undead (level 8 version), Finger of Death

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dracolich makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Ray of Sickness (level 2 version).

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +13, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 18 (2d10 + 7) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Necrotic Breath 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 20, each creature in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 52 (8d12) Necrotic damage. *Success:* Half damage.

legendaryActions.name: Pounce
entries: The dracolich moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendaryActions.name: Sickening Ray
entries: The dracolich uses Spellcasting to cast Ray of Sickness (level 2 version). The dracolich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Terrifying Presence
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 19, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the dracolich. *Failure:* 11 (2d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn. *Success or Failure:* The dracolich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Hooves
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d4 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The dragon can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Bite attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +13, reach 15 ft. *Hit:* 23 (3d10 + 7) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

actions.name: Tail
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +13, reach 15 ft. *Hit:* 18 (2d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Steam Breath 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 19, each creature in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 56 (16d6) Fire damage. *Success:* Half damage. *Success or Failure:* Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

name: Dretch
languages: Abyssal; telepathy 60 ft. (works only with creatures that understand Abyssal)

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Fetid Cloud (1/Day)
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 11, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the dretch. *Failure:* The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the creature can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both, and it can't take Reactions.

traits.name: Spider Climb
entries: The drider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drider has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

traits.name: Web Walker
entries: The drider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the drider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

spellcasting.name: Magic of the Spider Queen 5
entries: The drider casts Darkness, Faerie Fire, or Web, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14).

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The drider makes three attacks, using Foreleg or Poison Burst in any combination.

actions.name: Foreleg
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Poison Burst
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 13 (3d6 + 3) Poison damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The druid casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Druidcraft, Speak with Animals
2e/day: Entangle, Thunderwave
1e/day: Animal Messenger, Longstrider, Moonbeam

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The druid makes two attacks, using Vine Staff or Verdant Wisp in any combination.

actions.name: Vine Staff
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

actions.name: Verdant Wisp
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, range 90 ft. *Hit:* 10 (3d6) Radiant damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dryad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
entries: The dryad can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dryad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Animal Friendship, Charm Monster (lasts 24 hours; ends early if the dryad casts the spell again), Druidcraft
1e/day: Entangle, Pass without Trace

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dryad makes one Vine Lash or Thorn Burst attack, and it can use Spellcasting to cast Charm Monster.

actions.name: Vine Lash
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Thorn Burst
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, range 60 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

bonusActions.name: Tree Stride
entries: If within 5 feet of a Large or bigger tree, the dryad teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Large or bigger tree that is within 60 feet of the previous tree.

traits.name: Death Burst
entries: The mephit explodes when it dies. *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the mephit. *Failure:* 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage. *Success:* Half damage.

spellcasting.name: Sleep (1/Day)
entries: The mephit casts the Sleep spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 10).
1/day: Sleep

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Blinding Breath
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* The target has the Blinded condition until the end of the mephit's next turn.

actions.name: Talons
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 feet. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

name: Earth Elemental
senses: Darkvision 60 ft., Tremorsense 60 ft., passive Perception 10

traits.name: Earth Glide
entries: The elemental can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the elemental doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

traits.name: Siege Monster
entries: The elemental deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The elemental makes two attacks, using Slam or Rock Launch in any combination.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Rock Launch
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +8, range 60 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

traits.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the efreeti dies outside the Elemental Plane of Fire, its body dissolves into ash, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Fire.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The efreeti has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Wishes
entries: The efreeti has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the efreeti knows it, the efreeti can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the efreeti can understand. If the efreeti casts the spell for the creature, the efreeti suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the efreeti has cast it three times, the efreeti can't do so again for 365 days.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The efreeti casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Detect Magic, Elementalism
1e/day: Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift, Tongues, Wall of Fire (level 7 version)

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The efreeti makes three attacks, using Heated Blade or Hurl Flame in any combination.

actions.name: Heated Blade
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 13 (2d12) Fire damage.

actions.name: Hurl Flame
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +8, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 24 (7d6) Fire damage.

name: Elemental Cataclysm
speed: walk 60 ft., burrow 60 ft., fly 80 ft. (hover) (hover), swim 80 ft.

traits.name: Earth Glide
entries: The cataclysm can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the cataclysm doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the cataclysm fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Siege Monster
entries: The cataclysm deals double damage to objects and structures.

spellcasting.name: Control Weather
entries: The cataclysm casts the Control Weather spell, requiring no spell components and using Constitution as the spellcasting ability.
At will: Control Weather

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cataclysm makes two Elemental Burst attacks.

actions.name: Elemental Burst
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +15, reach 30 ft. or range 150 ft. *Hit:* 25 (5d6 + 8) damage of a type chosen by the cataclysm: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder.

actions.name: Cataclysmic Event 4
entries: The cataclysm creates one of the following effects at random (roll 1d4):

- 1: Clinging Flames
- 2: Freezing Waves
- 3: Raging Storm
- 4: Swallowing Earth

legendaryActions.name: Eruption
entries: The cataclysm makes one Elemental Burst attack.

legendaryActions.name: Rumbling Movement
entries: The cataclysm moves up to its Speed, Fly Speed, or Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attack. Each creature within 5 feet of the cataclysm as it moves is targeted once by the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 23. *Failure:* The target has the Prone condition. *Success or Failure:* The cataclysm can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Elementalism, Mage Hand

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three attacks, using Elemental Flail or Elemental Claw in any combination.

actions.name: Elemental Flail
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 25 (6d6 + 4) damage of a type chosen by the cultist: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder.

actions.name: Elemental Claw
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +7, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 22 (4d10) damage of a type chosen by the cultist: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the cultist moves the target up to 10 feet straight toward or away from itself.

reactions.name: Elemental Absorption (1/Day)
entries: The cultist takes Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder damage. {@actResponse The cultist gives itself Resistance to that instance of damage and gains 10 Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The elephant makes two Gore attacks.

actions.name: Gore
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the elephant moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

bonusActions.name: Trample
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature within 5 feet that has the Prone condition. *Failure:* 17 (2d10 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. *Success:* Half damage.

actions.name: Ram
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the elk moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 3 (1d6) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

name: Empyrean
speed: walk 50 ft., fly 50 ft. (hover) (hover), swim 50 ft.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the empyrean fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The empyrean has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The empyrean casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 23):
At will: Calm Emotions, Greater Restoration, Pass without Trace, Water Breathing
1e/day: Commune, Dispel Evil and Good, Plane Shift

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The empyrean makes two attacks, using Sacred Weapon or Divine Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Sacred Weapon
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +17, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 31 (6d6 + 10) Force damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the start of the empyrean's next turn. The target can choose not to be Stunned, in which case it takes an extra 21 Force damage that bypasses Resistance or Immunity.

actions.name: Divine Ray
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +15, range 600 ft. *Hit:* 35 (6d8 + 8) Necrotic or Radiant damage (empyrean's choice).

legendaryActions.name: Bolster
entries: The empyrean gains 10 Temporary Hit Points, and the empyrean and each ally within 30 feet of it gain Advantage on D20 Test until the end of the empyrean's next turn. The empyrean can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Shockwave of Glory
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 23, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the empyrean. *Failure:* 27 (6d8) Force damage, and the target has the Prone condition. *Success:* Half damage only. *Success or Failure:* The empyrean can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Smite
entries: The empyrean makes one Divine Ray attack.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The empyrean can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The empyrean has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The empyrean casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:
1e/day: Bless, Lesser Restoration (as an action)

spellcasting.name: Healing Word (1/Day)
entries: The empyrean casts Healing Word, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
1/day: Healing Word

actions.name: Otherworldly Strike
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Necrotic or Radiant damage (empyrean's choice).

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries: If the erinyes dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The erinyes has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Magic Rope
entries: The erinyes has a magic rope. While bearing it, the erinyes can use the Entangling Rope action. The rope has AC 20, HP 90, and Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage. The rope turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points, if it is 5+ feet away from the erinyes for 1 hour or more, or if the erinyes dies. If the rope is damaged or destroyed, the erinyes can fully restore it when finishing a Short Rest or Long Rest.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The erinyes makes three Withering Sword attacks and can use Entangling Rope.

actions.name: Withering Sword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Entangling Rope (Requires Magic Rope)
entries: *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature the erinyes can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 14 (4d6) Force damage, and the target has the Restrained condition until the rope is destroyed, the erinyes uses a Bonus Action to release the target, or the erinyes uses Entangling Rope again.

reactions.name: Parry
entries: The erinyes is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse The erinyes adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

traits.name: Spider Climb
entries: The ettercap can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Walker
entries: The ettercap ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the ettercap knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The ettercap makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the ettercap's next turn.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Web Strand 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 12, one Large or smaller creature the ettercap can see within 30 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage).

bonusActions.name: Reel
entries: The ettercap pulls one creature within 30 feet of itself that is Restrained by its Web Strand up to 25 feet straight toward itself.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The ettin makes one Battleaxe attack and one Morningstar attack.

actions.name: Battleaxe
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Morningstar
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

name: Faerie Dragon Adult
languages: Draconic, Sylvan; telepathy 60 ft. (faerie dragons only)

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dragon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Dancing Lights, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion
1e/day: Hallucinatory Terrain, Polymorph

spellcasting.name: Superior Invisibility
entries: The dragon casts Greater Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Greater Invisibility

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d4 + 5) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Euphoria Breath 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* The target has the Incapacitated condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While Incapacitated, the target uses all its movement on each of its turns to move in a random direction.

name: Faerie Dragon Youth
languages: Draconic, Sylvan; telepathy 60 ft. (faerie dragons only)

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dragon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):
At will: Dancing Lights, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion

spellcasting.name: Superior Invisibility
entries: The dragon casts Greater Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Greater Invisibility

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Euphoria Breath 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* The target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn and uses all its movement on its turn to move in a random direction.

name: Fiend Cultist
senses: Darkvision 90 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness), passive Perception 17

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Scorching Ray (level 5 version), Thaumaturgy
2/day: Fireball (level 6 version)

spellcasting.name: Hellish Rebuke
entries: The cultist casts Hellish Rebuke in response to that spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Hellish Rebuke

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three Pact Axe attacks.

actions.name: Pact Axe
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 10 (1d12 + 4) Slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) Fire damage.

traits.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the elemental's turns, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the elemental takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage. Creatures and flammable objects in the Emanation [Area of Effect] start burning.

traits.name: Fire Form
entries: The elemental can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so, and it can enter a creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage.

traits.name: Illumination
entries: The elemental sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

traits.name: Water Susceptibility
entries: The elemental takes 3 (1d6) Cold damage for every 5 feet the elemental moves in water or for every gallon of water splashed on it.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The elemental makes two Burn attacks.

actions.name: Burn
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d6 + 3) Fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it starts burning.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Flame Sword or Hammer Throw in any combination.

actions.name: Flame Sword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +11, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 21 (4d6 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Hammer Throw
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +11, range 60/240 ft. *Hit:* 23 (3d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Fire damage, and the target is pushed up to 15 feet straight away from the giant and has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Illumination
entries: The flameskull sheds Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 15 feet.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The flameskull has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the flameskull is destroyed, it regains all its Hit Points in 1 hour unless Holy Water is sprinkled on its remains or the Dispel Evil and Good spell is cast on them.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The flameskull casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Mage Hand
1/day: Fireball
2/day: Magic Missile (level 2 version)

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The flameskull makes two Fire Ray attacks.

actions.name: Fire Ray
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. *Hit:* 13 (3d6 + 3) Fire damage.

name: Flaming Skeleton
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Death Burst
entries: The skeleton explodes when it dies. *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 12, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the skeleton. *Failure:* 14 (4d6) Fire damage. *Success:* Half damage.

traits.name: Illumination
entries: The skeleton sheds Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 15 feet.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The skeleton makes two attacks, using Flame Scepter or Hurl Flame in any combination.

actions.name: Flame Scepter
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Hurl Flame
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 60 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d10 + 2) Fire damage.

name: Flesh Golem
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Aversion to Fire
entries: If the golem takes Fire damage, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Berserk
entries: Whenever the golem starts its turn Bloodied, roll 1d6. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object. Once the golem goes berserk, it remains so until it is destroyed or it is no longer Bloodied.

The golem's creator, if within 60 feet of the berserk golem, can try to calm it by taking an action to make a DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check; the golem must be able to hear its creator. If this check succeeds, the golem ceases being berserk until the start of its next turn, at which point it resumes rolling for the Berserk trait again if it is still Bloodied.

traits.name: Immutable Form
entries: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Lightning Absorption
entries: Whenever the golem is subjected to Lightning damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The golem makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Lightning damage.

name: Flumph
languages: understands Undercommon but can't speak; telepathy 60 ft.

traits.name: Advanced Telepathy
entries: The flumph perceives the content of any telepathic communication within 60 feet of it.

traits.name: Prone Deficiency
entries: If the flumph receives the Prone condition, roll a die. On an odd number, it has the Incapacitated condition. At the end of each of its turns, the flumph makes a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, ending the Incapacitated condition on a success.

traits.name: Telepathic Shroud
entries: The flumph's thoughts can't be read by any means, and magic can't detect its location or observe it remotely.

actions.name: Tentacle
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 feet. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Acid damage.

actions.name: Stench Spray (1/Day)
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 10, one creature the flumph can see within 15 feet. *Failure:* The target is coated in a foul-smelling liquid, exudes a stench for 1d4 hours, and has the Poisoned condition while the stench lasts. Other creatures have the Poisoned condition while in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the coated target. The target can remove the stench on itself if it bathes during a Short Rest or Long Rest.

name: Flying Snake
speed: walk 30 ft., fly 60 ft., swim 30 ft.

traits.name: Flyby
entries: The snake doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The fomorian makes two Stone Club attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Warping Hex if available.

actions.name: Stone Club
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 15 ft. *Hit:* 24 (4d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Warping Hex 4
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature the fomorian can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 21 (6d6) Psychic damage, and the target gains 1 Exhaustion level. *Success:* Half damage only.

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The frog can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Standing Leap
entries: The frog's Long Jump is up to 10 feet and its High Jump is up to 5 feet with or without a running start.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Frost Axe or Great Bow in any combination.

actions.name: Frost Axe
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 19 (2d12 + 6) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Cold damage.

actions.name: Great Bow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +9, range 150/600 ft. *Hit:* 17 (2d10 + 6) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Cold damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

bonusActions.name: War Cry 5
entries: The giant or one creature of its choice that can see or hear it gains 16 (2d10 + 5) Temporary Hit Points and has Advantage on attack rolls until the start of the giant's next turn.

name: Galeb Duhr
speed: walk 15 ft. (30 ft. when rolling, 60 ft. rolling downhill)
senses: Darkvision 60 ft., Tremorsense 60 ft., passive Perception 11

actions.name: Avalanche Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the galeb duhr moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Animate Boulders (1/Day)
entries: The galeb duhr magically animates one or two boulders it can see within 60 feet of itself. Each boulder uses the Galeb Duhr stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1 and lacks this action. The boulder takes its turn immediately after the galeb duhr on the same Initiative count, and it obeys the galeb duhr. A boulder remains animate for 1 minute or until it or the galeb duhr dies.

traits.name: Flyby
entries: The gargoyle doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The gargoyle makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

traits.name: Death Burst
entries: The gas spore bursts when it dies. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 10, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the gas spore. *Failure:* The target takes 10 (3d6) Poison damage and has the Poisoned condition for 1d12 hours. Unless the Poisoned condition is removed, the target dies at the end of that time and sprouts 2d4 Tiny Gas Spore Fungi (each with 1 Hit Points). After 2d6 days, they become Large and have 13 Hit Points.

actions.name: Tendril
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +0, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 3 (1d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Ooze Cube
entries: The cube fills its entire space and is transparent. Other creatures can enter that space, but a creature that does so is subjected to the cube's Engulf and has Disadvantage on the saving throw.
Creatures inside the cube have Cover, and the cube can hold one Large creature or up to four Medium or Small creatures inside itself at a time.
As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the cube can pull a creature or an object out of the cube by succeeding on a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) check, and the puller takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage.

traits.name: Transparent
entries: Even when the cube is in plain sight, a creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice the cube if the creature hasn't witnessed the cube move or otherwise act.

actions.name: Pseudopod
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (3d6 + 2) Acid damage.

actions.name: Engulf
entries: The cube moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attack. The cube can move through the spaces of Large or smaller creatures if it has room inside itself to contain them (see the Ooze Cube [Area of Effect] trait). *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 12, each creature whose space the cube enters for the first time during this move. *Failure:* 10 (3d6) Acid damage, and the target is engulfed. An engulfed target is suffocating, can't cast spells with a Verbal component, has the Restrained condition, and takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the cube's turns. When the cube moves, the engulfed target moves with it. An engulfed target can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) check. On a successful check, the target escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space. *Success:* Half damage, and the target moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the cube. If there is no unoccupied space, the target fails the save instead.

traits.name: Stench
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 10, any creature that starts its turn in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the ghast. *Failure:* The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn. *Success:* The target is immune to this ghast's Stench for 24 hours.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a non-Undead creature, it is subjected to the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 10. *Failure:* The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Stench
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 13, any creature that starts its turn in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the ghast. *Failure:* The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn. *Success:* The target is immune to this ghast's Stench for 24 hours.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The ghast casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability:
At will: Speak with Dead, Thaumaturgy

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghast makes two Horrific Necrosis attacks. It can replace one attack with a Claw attack.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (3d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target isn't an Undead, it has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Horrific Necrosis
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d10 + 4) Necrotic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Ethereal Sight
entries: The ghost can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

spellcasting.name: Etherealness
entries: The ghost casts the Etherealness spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. The ghost is visible on the Material Plane while on the Border Ethereal and vice versa, but it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.
At will: Etherealness

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghost makes two Withering Touch attacks.

actions.name: Withering Touch
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 19 (3d10 + 3) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Horrific Visage
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect] that can see the ghost and isn't an Undead. *Failure:* 10 (2d6 + 3) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the ghost's next turn. *Success:* The target is immune to this ghost's Horrific Visage for 24 hours.

actions.name: Possession
entries: *Charisma Saving Throw:* DC 13, one Humanoid the ghost can see within 5 feet. *Failure:* The target is possessed by the ghost; the ghost disappears, and the target has the Incapacitated condition and loses control of its body. The ghost now controls the body, but the target retains awareness. The ghost can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that specifically target Undead. The ghost's game statistics are the same, except it uses the possessed target's Speed, as well as the target's Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution modifiers.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 Hit Points or the ghost leaves as a Bonus Action. When the possession ends, the ghost appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours. *Success:* The target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghoul makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't an Undead or elf, it is subjected to the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 10. *Failure:* The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack

If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. *Success:* Half damage only.

actions.name: Talons
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Swallow
entries: The frog swallows a Small or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it has Cover against attacks and other effects outside the frog. While swallowing the target, the frog can't use Bite, and if the frog dies, the swallowed target is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the Prone condition.
At the end of the frog's next turn, the swallowed target takes 5 (2d4) Acid damage. If that damage doesn't kill it, the frog disgorges it, causing it to exit Prone.

- 1-4 The target does nothing.
- 5-6 The target takes no action or Bonus Action and uses all its movement to move in a random direction.
- 7-8 The target makes a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.
