entries: The goblin makes two attacks, using Scimitar or Shortbow in any combination.

actions.name: Scimitar
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Slashing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

actions.name: Shortbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 80/320 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

bonusActions.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

reactions.name: Redirect Attack
entries: A creature the goblin can see makes an attack roll against it. {@actResponse The goblin chooses a Small or Medium ally within 5 feet of itself. The goblin and that ally swap places, and the ally becomes the target of the attack instead.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The goblin casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Minor Illusion
1e/day: Blindness/Deafness, Faerie Fire, Grease

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The goblin makes two Hex Stick attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Hex Stick
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d8 + 3) Psychic damage.

reactions.name: Jinx
entries: A creature the goblin can see hits it with an attack roll. {@actResponse d*Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 13, the triggering creature. *Failure:* The attack misses instead.

actions.name: Dagger
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

bonusActions.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

actions.name: Scimitar
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Slashing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

actions.name: Shortbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 80/320 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

bonusActions.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

name: Gold Dragon Wyrmling
speed: walk 30 ft., fly 60 ft., swim 30 ft.
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The dragon can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 22 (4d10) Fire damage. *Success:* Half damage.

actions.name: Weakening Breath
entries: *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* The target has Disadvantage on Strength-based D20 Test and subtracts 2 (1d4) from its damage rolls. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

actions.name: Gore
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 18 (2d12 + 5) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the gorgon moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Petrifying Breath 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure 1:* The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. *Failure 2:* The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

bonusActions.name: Trample
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature within 5 feet that has the Prone condition. *Failure:* 16 (2d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. *Success:* Half damage.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the goristro dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The goristro has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Siege Monster
entries: The goristro deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The goristro makes one Brutal Gore attack and two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Brutal Gore
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +13, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 40 (6d10 + 7) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is pushed up to 20 feet straight away from the goristro and has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +13, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 29 (4d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage.

bonusActions.name: Charge
entries: The goristro moves up to half its Speed straight toward an enemy it can see.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the revenant dies, it revives 24 hours later unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its remains. If it revives, it animates another group of corpses elsewhere on the same plane of existence; it now looks different but uses the same stat block and returns with all its Hit Points.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The revenant makes two Suffocate attacks.

actions.name: Suffocate
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 10 (1d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 15). Until the grapple ends, the target is suffocating. The revenant can have up to two targets Grappled in this way at a time.

actions.name: Haunting Glare 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the revenant. *Failure:* The target has the Paralyzed condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

traits.name: Amorphous
entries: The ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Corrosive Form
entries: Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the ooze and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the ooze and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the weapon.
The ooze can eat through 2-inch-thick, nonmagical metal or wood in 1 round.

actions.name: Pseudopod
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d8 + 1) Acid damage. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor.

name: Gray Slaad
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 17

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: The slaad regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Points.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The slaad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Invisibility (self only), Mage Hand, Major Image
1e/day: Cloudkill, Fly, Plane Shift (self only), Tongues

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The slaad makes two Chaos Claw attacks.

actions.name: Chaos Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage. Until the start of the slaad's next turn, the target has a condition determined by rolling 1d4: on a 1, Charmed; on a 2, Frightened; on a 3, Poisoned; or on a 4, Incapacitated.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The slaad shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

name: Green Dragon Wyrmling
speed: walk 30 ft., fly 60 ft., swim 30 ft.
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The dragon can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 21 (6d6) Poison damage. *Success:* Half damage.

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The hag can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Mimicry
entries: The hag can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations only with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

spellcasting.name: Coven Magic
entries: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 11): Augury, Find Familiar, Identify, Locate Object, Scrying, or Unseen Servant. The hag must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Dancing Lights, Disguise Self (24-hour duration), Invisibility (self only, and the hag leaves no tracks while Invisible), Minor Illusion, Ray of Sickness (level 3 version)

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hag makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

name: Green Slaad
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: The slaad regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Points.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The slaad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Mage Hand
1e/day: Fireball, Invisibility (self only)

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The slaad makes three Chaos Staff attacks.

actions.name: Chaos Staff
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. or range 60 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) Force damage. Until the start of the slaad's next turn, the target has a condition determined by rolling 1d4: on a 1, Charmed; on a 2, Frightened; on a 3, Poisoned; or on a 4, Incapacitated.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The slaad shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Abduct
entries: The grell needn't spend extra movement to move a creature it is grappling.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The grell makes one Beak attack and one Paralyzing Tentacles attack.

actions.name: Beak
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d10 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12) from two of ten tentacles. The target is also subjected to the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 11. *Failure:* The target has the Poisoned condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While Poisoned, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The grick makes one Beak attack and one Tentacles attack.

actions.name: Beak
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Tentacles
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12) from all four tentacles.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The grick makes one Beak attack, one Slam attack, and one Tentacles attack.

actions.name: Beak
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 22 (4d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Tentacles
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d10 + 4) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from all four tentacles.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The griffon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from both of the griffon's front claws.

actions.name: Bone Cudgel
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Spear
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d6 + 1) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The guard makes two attacks, using Javelin or Longsword in any combination.

actions.name: Javelin
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Longsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d10 + 4) Slashing damage.

name: Guardian Naga
speed: walk 40 ft., climb 40 ft., swim 40 ft.

traits.name: Celestial Restoration
entries: If the naga dies, it returns to life in 1d6 days and regains all its Hit Points unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its remains.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The naga casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Thaumaturgy
1e/day: Clairvoyance, Cure Wounds (level 6 version), Flame Strike (level 6 version), Geas, True Seeing

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The naga makes two Bite attacks. It can replace any attack with a use of Poisonous Spittle.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 17 (2d12 + 4) Piercing damage plus 22 (4d10) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poisonous Spittle
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature the naga can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* 31 (7d8) Poison damage, and the target has the Blinded condition until the start of the naga's next turn. *Success:* Half damage only.

traits.name: Blight Seeds
entries: When it finishes a Long Rest, the blight expels 1d6 seeds into unoccupied spaces on the ground within 30 feet of itself. After 24 hours, the seeds become creatures under the blight's control. Roll 1d8 for each seed to determine the creature it becomes: on 1-4, Twig Blight; on 5-6, Needle Blight; on 7-8, Vine Blight.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The blight makes two attacks, using Slam or Thorn Volley in any combination. It also uses Life-Draining Root.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +12, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 25 (4d8 + 7) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Thorn Volley
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +12, range 60/180 ft. *Hit:* 20 (3d8 + 7) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Life-Draining Root
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 20, one Huge or smaller creature the blight can see within 30 feet. *Failure:* 14 (2d6 + 7) Necrotic damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 17) from one of six roots. Until the grapple ends, the target has the Restrained condition and takes 14 (4d6) Necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns. The target's Hit Points maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the blight regains Hit Points equal to that amount.

name: Half-Dragon
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 15

traits.name: Draconic Origin
entries: The half-dragon is related to a type of dragon associated with one of the following damage types (DM's choice): Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. This choice affects other aspects of the stat block.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The half-dragon makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait.

actions.name: Dragon's Breath 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 28 (8d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait. *Success:* Half damage.

bonusActions.name: Leap
entries: The half-dragon jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (2d4 + 1) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Luring Song
entries: The harpy sings a magical melody, which lasts until the harpy's Concentration ends on it. *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 11, each Humanoid and Giant in a 300-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the harpy when the song starts. *Failure:* The target has the Charmed condition until the song ends and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. While Charmed, the target has the Incapacitated condition and ignores the Luring Song of other harpies. If the target is more than 5 feet from the harpy, the target moves on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the harpy. It doesn't avoid Opportunity Attack; however, before moving into damaging terrain (such as lava or a pit) and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, the target repeats the save. *Success:* The target is immune to this harpy's Luring Song for 24 hours.

traits.name: Haunted Zone
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 17, any creature that casts a spell while inside the revenant's space. *Failure:* The spell fails and is wasted.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the revenant dies, it revives 24 hours later unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its remains. If it revives, it animates another Gargantuan object or structure elsewhere on the same plane of existence; it now looks different but uses the same stat block and returns with all its Hit Points.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The revenant makes two Object Slam attacks and uses Invitation.

actions.name: Object Slam
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +9 (with Advantage if the target is inside the revenant's space), reach 10 ft. or range 30/90 ft. *Hit:* 27 (5d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Invitation
entries: *Charisma Saving Throw:* DC 17, each creature in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* The target is teleported inside the revenant's space and swallowed. A swallowed creature has Cover against attacks and other effects outside the revenant.
While the revenant has Hit Points, a swallowed creature can leave the revenant's space only by using magic that enables planar travel, such as the Plane Shift spell.

actions.name: Talons
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Slashing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hound has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hound makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 17 (5d6) Fire damage. *Success:* Half damage.

name: Helmed Horror
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The helmed horror has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Spell Immunity
entries: The helmed horror is immune to three spells chosen by its creator. Typical choices include Heat Metal, Lightning Bolt, and Magic Missile.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The helmed horror makes two Arcane Sword attacks.

actions.name: Arcane Sword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 5 (1d10) Force damage.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the hezrou dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The hezrou has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Stench
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 16, any creature that starts its turn in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the hezrou. *Failure:* The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hezrou makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Poison damage.

bonusActions.name: Leap
entries: The hezrou jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Tree Club or Trash Lob in any combination.

actions.name: Tree Club
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 18 (3d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Trash Lob
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +8, range 60/240 ft. *Hit:* 16 (2d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Flyby
entries: The hippogriff doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hippogriff makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

traits.name: Hold Breath
entries: The hippopotamus can hold its breath for 10 minutes.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hippopotamus makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 16 (2d10 + 5) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Aura of Authority
entries: While in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the hobgoblin, the hobgoblin and its allies have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the hobgoblin doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hobgoblin makes two attacks, using Greatsword or Longbow in any combination.

actions.name: Greatsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 150/600 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

traits.name: Aura of Authority
entries: While in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the hobgoblin, the hobgoblin and its allies have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the hobgoblin doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hobgoblin makes three attacks, using Javelin or Longsword in any combination.

actions.name: Javelin
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the start of the hobgoblin's next turn.

actions.name: Longsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

reactions.name: Parry
entries: The hobgoblin is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse The hobgoblin adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hobgoblin has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hobgoblin's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Longsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d10 + 1) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +3, range 150/600 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage plus 7 (3d4) Poison damage.

name: Homunculus
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Telepathic Bond
entries: While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, the two of them can communicate telepathically with each other.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage, and the target is subjected to the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 12. *Failure:* The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the homunculus's next turn. 5 The target has the Poisoned condition for 1 minute. While Poisoned, the target has the Unconscious condition, which ends early if the target takes any damage.

name: Hook Horror
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 15

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hook horror makes two Hook attacks.

actions.name: Hook
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the hook horror moves the target 5 feet straight toward or away from itself.

name: Horned Devil
senses: Darkvision 150 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness), passive Perception 13

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes three attacks, using Searing Fork or Hurl Flame in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Infernal Tail.

actions.name: Searing Fork
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Fire damage.

actions.name: Hurl Flame
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +8, range 150 ft. *Hit:* 26 (5d8 + 4) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

actions.name: Infernal Tail
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 17, one creature the devil can see within 10 feet. *Failure:* 10 (1d8 + 6) Necrotic damage, and the target receives an infernal wound if it doesn't have one. While wounded, the target loses 10 (3d6) Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores Hit Points to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding on a DC 17 Wisdom (Medicine) check.

traits.name: Water Breathing
entries: The shark can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Hold Breath
entries: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.

traits.name: Multiple Heads
entries: The hydra has five heads. Whenever the hydra takes 25 damage or more on a single turn, one of its heads dies. The hydra dies if all its heads are dead. At the end of each of its turns when it has at least one living head, the hydra grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken Fire damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 20 Hit Points when it grows new heads.

traits.name: Reactive Heads
entries: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra Reaction that can be used only for Opportunity Attack.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hydra makes as many Bite attacks as it has heads.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 10 (1d10 + 5) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hyena has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 3 (1d6) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Ice Wall
entries: The devil casts Wall of Ice (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes three Ice Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack.

actions.name: Ice Spear
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +10, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Cold damage. Until the end of its next turn, the target can't take a Bonus Action or Reaction, its Speed decreases by 10 feet, and it can move or take one action on its turn, not both. The spear magically returns to the devil's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Tail
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 15 (3d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Cold damage.

traits.name: Death Burst
entries: The mephit explodes when it dies. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the mephit. *Failure:* 5 (2d4) Cold damage. *Success:* Half damage.

spellcasting.name: Fog Cloud (1/Day)
entries: The mephit casts Fog Cloud, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
1/day: Fog Cloud

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Cold damage.

actions.name: Frost Breath
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 7 (3d4) Cold damage. *Success:* Half damage.

name: Imp
senses: Darkvision 120 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness), passive Perception 11

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The imp has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Invisibility
entries: The imp casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
At will: Invisibility

actions.name: Sting
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The imp shape-shifts to resemble a rat (Speed 20 ft.), a raven (20 ft., Fly 60 ft.), or a spider (20 ft., Climb 20 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Succubus Form
entries: When the incubus finishes a Long Rest, it can shape-shift into a Succubus, using that stat block instead of this one. Any equipment it's wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The incubus casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Disguise Self, Etherealness
1e/day: Dream, Hypnotic Pattern

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The incubus makes two Restless Touch attacks.

actions.name: Restless Touch
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 15 (3d6 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 24 hours or until the incubus dies. Until the curse ends, the target gains no benefit from finishing Short Rests.

bonusActions.name: Nightmare
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 15, one creature the incubus can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it has the Unconscious condition for 1 hour, until it takes damage, or until a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. Otherwise, the target takes 18 (4d8) Psychic damage.

name: Intellect Devourer
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak; telepathy 60 ft.

traits.name: Detect Intelligence
entries: The intellect devourer magically senses the location of any creature within 300 feet of itself that has an Intelligence score of 3 or higher, regardless of interposing barriers.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The intellect devourer makes one Claw attack and uses Devour Intellect.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Devour Intellect
entries: *Intelligence Saving Throw:* DC 12, one creature the intellect devourer can see within 5 feet. *Failure:* 11 (2d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the end of the intellect devourer's next turn.

actions.name: Steal Body
entries: *Intelligence Saving Throw:* DC 12, one Small or Medium creature within 5 feet that has the Incapacitated condition, is a Humanoid or Beast, and has 10 Hit Points or fewer. *Failure:* The intellect devourer possesses the target, consumes its brain, and teleports inside its skull. While there, the intellect devourer has Cover against attacks and other effects originating outside its host. The intellect devourer retains its Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; its understanding of Deep Speech; its telepathy; and its Detect Intelligence trait. It otherwise adopts the target's game statistics. It knows everything the target knew, including spells and languages.

If the host body dies, the intellect devourer must leave it. The intellect devourer is also forced out if the target regains its devoured brain by means of a Wish spell. By spending 5 feet of its movement, the intellect devourer can voluntarily leave the body, teleporting to the nearest unoccupied space within 5 feet of it. The body then dies unless its brain is restored before the end of the intellect devourer's next turn.

traits.name: Air Form
entries: The stalker can enter an enemy's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Invisibility
entries: The stalker has the Invisible condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The stalker makes three Wind Swipe attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Vortex.

actions.name: Wind Swipe
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Force damage.

actions.name: Vortex
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 14, one Large or smaller creature in the stalker's space. *Failure:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Thunder damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Until the grapple ends, the target can't cast spells with a Verbal component and takes 7 (2d6) Thunder damage at the start of each of the stalker's turns.

name: Iron Golem
languages: understands Common plus two other languages but can't speak

traits.name: Fire Absorption
entries: Whenever the golem is subjected to Fire damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Fire damage dealt.

traits.name: Immutable Form
entries: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The golem makes two attacks, using Bladed Arm or Fiery Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Bladed Arm
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +12, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 20 (3d8 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fiery Bolt
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +10, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 36 (8d8) Fire damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 55 (10d10) Poison damage. *Success:* Half damage.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +1, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The jackalwere has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the jackalwere's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The jackalwere makes two Rend or Slam attacks.

actions.name: Rend (Jackal or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Slam (Human or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Sleep Gaze 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 10, one creature the jackalwere can see within 30 feet (Constructs and Undead succeed automatically). *Failure:* The target has the Unconscious condition for 10 minutes or until it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. *Success:* The target is immune to this jackalwere's Sleep Gaze for 24 hours.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The jackalwere shape-shifts into a Medium human or a Medium jackal-humanoid hybrid, or it returns to its true form (that of a Small jackal). Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

name: Juvenile Shadow Dragon
speed: walk 30 ft., climb 30 ft., fly 60 ft.
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

traits.name: Living Shadow
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the dragon has Resistance to damage that isn't Force, Psychic, or Radiant.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the dragon has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Shadow Breath 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 30-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 17 (5d6) Necrotic damage. *Success:* Half damage. *Success or Failure:* A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage dies, and a Shadow rises from its corpse. The shadow is under the dragon's control and shares the dragon's Initiative count but acts immediately after the dragon.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the dragon takes the Hide action.

traits.name: Mimicry
entries: The kenku can mimic any sounds it has heard, including voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

spellcasting.name: Eldritch Lantern 4
entries: The kenku casts Faerie Fire, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 10).

actions.name: Shadow Blade
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Necrotic damage. The blade magically returns to the kenku's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

traits.name: Hold Breath
entries: The whale can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 21 (5d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The knight makes two attacks, using Greatsword or Heavy Crossbow in any combination.

actions.name: Greatsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +2, range 100/400 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d10) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

reactions.name: Parry
entries: The knight is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse The knight adds 2 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The kobold has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kobold has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Dagger
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

name: Kraken
languages: understands Abyssal, Celestial, Infernal, and Primordial but can't speak; telepathy 120 ft.

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The kraken can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If the kraken fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Siege Monster
entries: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The kraken makes two Tentacle attacks and uses Fling, Lightning Strike, or Swallow.

actions.name: Tentacle
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +17, reach 30 ft. *Hit:* 24 (4d6 + 10) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 20) from one of ten tentacles, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Fling
entries: The kraken throws a Large or smaller creature Grappled by it to a space it can see within 60 feet of itself that isn't in the air. *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 25, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. *Failure:* 18 (4d8) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. *Success:* Half damage only.

actions.name: Lightning Strike
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 23, one creature the kraken can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 33 (6d10) Lightning damage. *Success:* Half damage.

actions.name: Swallow
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 25, one creature Grappled by the kraken (it can have up to four creatures swallowed at a time). *Failure:* 23 (3d8 + 10) Piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is swallowed and no longer Grappled. A swallowed creature has the Restrained condition, has Cover against attacks and other effects outside the kraken, and takes 24 (7d6) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns.

If the kraken takes 50 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the kraken must succeed on a DC 25 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the kraken with the Prone condition. If the kraken dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

legendaryActions.name: Storm Bolt
entries: The kraken uses Lightning Strike.

legendaryActions.name: Toxic Ink
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 23, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the kraken while it is underwater. *Failure:* The target has the Blinded and Poisoned conditions until the end of the kraken's next turn. The kraken then moves up to its Speed. *Success or Failure:* The kraken can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

name: Kuo-toa
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., Truesight 30 ft., passive Perception 14

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Spear
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Sticky Net (1/Day)
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 10, one Large or smaller creature the kuo-toa can see within 15 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Restrained condition until the net is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage). A creature can take an action to make a DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check to free itself or another creature in a net within 5 feet, destroying the net on a success.

reactions.name: Sticky Shield
entries: A creature misses the kuo-toa with a melee attack roll using a weapon. {@actResponse d*Strength Saving Throw:* DC 11, the triggering creature. *Failure:* The attack's weapon sticks to the kuo-toa's shield. If the target doesn't let go of the weapon, the target has the Grappled condition while the weapon is stuck (escape DC 11). While stuck, the weapon can't be used. The target can take an action to make a DC 11 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing the weapon on a success.

name: Kuo-toa Archpriest
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., Truesight 30 ft., passive Perception 19

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The kuo-toa casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Detect Magic, Thaumaturgy
1e/day: Destructive Wave, Divination, Hold Monster (level 6 version), Scrying, Tongues

spellcasting.name: Shield of Faith (2/Day)
entries: The kuo-toa casts Shield of Faith, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
2/day: Shield of Faith

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The kuo-toa makes three Strange Scepter attacks.

actions.name: Strange Scepter
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 20 (5d6 + 3) Lightning damage.

name: Kuo-toa Monitor
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., Truesight 30 ft., passive Perception 16

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The kuo-toa makes two Bone Whip attacks.

actions.name: Bone Whip
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Lightning damage, and the target can't make Opportunity Attack until the start of the kuo-toa's next turn.

name: Kuo-toa Whip
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., Truesight 30 ft., passive Perception 16

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

spellcasting.name: Shield of Faith (2/Day)
entries: The kuo-toa casts Shield of Faith, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.
2/day: Shield of Faith

actions.name: Pincer Staff
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d6 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12). Until the grapple ends, the kuo-toa can't make Pincer Staff attacks.

actions.name: Conjure Slimy Glob
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 60 ft. *Hit:* 9 (3d4 + 2) Acid damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghoul makes two Icy Bite attacks.

actions.name: Icy Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d6 + 2) Cold damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 5 feet until the start of the ghoul's next turn.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't an Undead or elf, it is subjected to the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 10. *Failure:* The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

bonusActions.name: Watery Rush
entries: While underwater, the ghoul moves up to half its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The lamia casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Disguise Self (can appear as a Large or Medium biped), Minor Illusion
1e/day: Geas, Major Image, Scrying

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The lamia makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Corrupting Touch.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Corrupting Touch
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 13, one creature the lamia can see within 5 feet. *Failure:* 13 (3d8) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 1 hour. Until the curse ends, the target has the Charmed and Poisoned conditions.

bonusActions.name: Leap
entries: The lamia jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

name: Larva
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +1, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 (1d4 - 1) Necrotic damage.

name: Lemure
senses: Darkvision 120 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness), passive Perception 10

traits.name: Hellish Restoration
entries: If the lemure dies in the Nine Hells, it revives with all its Hit Points in 1d10 days unless it is killed by a creature under the effects of a Bless spell or its remains are sprinkled with Holy Water.

actions.name: Vile Slime
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Spirit Jar
entries: If destroyed, the lich reforms in 1d10 days if it has a spirit jar, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the lich's lair.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The lich casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Fireball (level 5 version), Invisibility, Lightning Bolt (level 5 version), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
2e/day: Animate Dead, Dimension Door, Plane Shift
1e/day: Chain Lightning, Finger of Death, Power Word Kill, Scrying

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic
entries: The lich casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Counterspell, Shield

spellcasting.name: Frightening Gaze
entries: The lich casts Fear, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The lich makes three attacks, using Eldritch Burst or Paralyzing Touch in any combination.

actions.name: Eldritch Burst
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +12, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 31 (4d12 + 5) Force damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +12, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 15 (3d6 + 5) Cold damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the start of the lich's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Deathly Teleport
entries: The lich teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space it left takes 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage.

legendaryActions.name: Disrupt Life
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 20, each creature that isn't an Undead in a 20-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the lich. *Failure:* 31 (9d6) Necrotic damage. *Success:* Half damage. *Success or Failure:* The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The lion has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the lion's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Running Leap
entries: With a 10-foot running start, the lion can Long Jump up to 25 feet.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The lion makes two Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Roar.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Roar
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 11, one creature within 15 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Frightened condition until the start of the lion's next turn.

traits.name: Spider Climb
entries: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage.

name: Lizardfolk Geomancer
speed: walk 30 ft., burrow 20 ft., swim 30 ft.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The lizardfolk casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):
At will: Elementalism
1e/day: Meld into Stone, Speak with Plants, Spike Growth

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The lizardfolk makes two Earth Burst attacks.

actions.name: Earth Burst
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Hail of Stone 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 12, each creature in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder [Area of Effect] centered on a point the lizardfolk can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* 15 (6d4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. *Success:* Half damage only.

name: Lizardfolk Sovereign
speed: walk 30 ft., burrow 20 ft., swim 30 ft.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The lizardfolk makes one Bite attack and one Earthen Maul attack.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d10 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't a Construct or an Undead, the lizardfolk gains Temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt.

actions.name: Earthen Maul
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

bonusActions.name: Charge
entries: The lizardfolk moves up to its Speed or Swim Speed straight toward an enemy it can see.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The mage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Detect Magic, Light, Mage Armor (included in AC), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
2e/day: Fireball (level 4 version), Invisibility
1e/day: Cone of Cold, Fly

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (3/Day)
entries: The mage casts Misty Step, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Misty Step

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (3/Day)
entries: The mage casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Counterspell, Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The mage makes three Arcane Burst attacks.

actions.name: Arcane Burst
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 16 (3d8 + 3) Force damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The mage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
1e/day: Disguise Self, Ice Knife, Mage Armor (included in AC), Thunderwave

actions.name: Arcane Burst
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d10 + 3) Force damage.

traits.name: Death Burst

If the marid knows it, the marid can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the marid can understand. If the marid casts the spell for the creature, the marid suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the marid has cast it three times, the marid can't do so again for 365 days.

The bag has AC 15, HP 20, and Resistance to all damage. The bag turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points. If the bag is destroyed, any souls the bag is holding are released. The hag can create a new bag after 7 days.

entries: While on the Ethereal Plane, the hag casts Dream, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. Only the hag can serve as the spell's messenger, and the target must be a creature the hag can see on the Material Plane. The spell fails and is wasted if the target is under the effect of the Protection from Evil and Good spell or within a Magic Circle spell.

If the target takes damage from the Dream spell, the target's Hit Points maximum decreases by an amount equal to that damage. If the spell kills the target, its soul is trapped in the hag's soul bag, and the target can't be raised from the dead until its soul is released.
