entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +14, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 22 (3d8 + 9) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 19), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Tail Stinger
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +14, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 16 (2d6 + 9) Piercing damage plus 35 (10d6) Poison damage.

bonusActions.name: Swallow
entries: *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 19, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the worm (it can have up to three creatures swallowed at a time). *Failure:* The target is swallowed by the worm, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, has Cover against attacks and other effects outside the worm, and takes 17 (5d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the worm's turns.

If the worm takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the worm must succeed on a DC 21 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the worm and has the Prone condition. If the worm dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 20 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

traits.name: Bloodied Fury
entries: While Bloodied, the quaggoth has Advantage on attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The quaggoth makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage, or 13 (3d6 + 3) Slashing damage if the quaggoth is Bloodied.

traits.name: Bloodied Fury
entries: While Bloodied, the quaggoth has Advantage on attack rolls.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The quaggoth casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):
At will: Mage Hand (the hand is Invisible), Minor Illusion
2/day: Mind Spike

spellcasting.name: Psionic Defense (3/Day)
entries: The quaggoth casts Feather Fall or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Feather Fall, Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The quaggoth makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 5 (2d4) Psychic damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The quasit has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Invisibility
entries: The quasit casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
At will: Invisibility

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the quasit's next turn.

actions.name: Scare (1/Day)
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 10, one creature within 20 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Frightened condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

actions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The quasit shape-shifts to resemble a bat (Speed 10 ft., Fly 40 ft.), a centipede (40 ft., Climb 40 ft.), or a toad (40 ft., Swim 40 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Aura of Bravery
entries: Creatures of the knight's choice in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from it have Immunity to the Charmed and Frightened conditions while there.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The knight casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
1e/day: Daylight, Dispel Evil and Good, Greater Restoration, Phantom Steed

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The knight makes three attacks, using Greatsword or Longbow in any combination.

actions.name: Greatsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 22 (5d8) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +7, range 150/600 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 22 (5d8) Radiant damage.

traits.name: Greater Magic Resistance
entries: The rakshasa automatically succeeds on saving throws against spells and other magical effects, and the attack rolls of spells automatically miss it. Without the rakshasa's permission, no spell can observe the rakshasa remotely or detect its thoughts, creature type, or alignment.

traits.name: Fiendish Restoration
entries: If the rakshasa dies outside the Nine Hells, its body turns to ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The rakshasa casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Disguise Self, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion
1e/day: Fly, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The rakshasa makes three Cursed Touch attacks.

actions.name: Cursed Touch
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 19 (3d12) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a Short Rest or Long Rest.

actions.name: Baleful Command 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 18, each enemy in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the rakshasa. *Failure:* 28 (8d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened and Incapacitated conditions until the start of the rakshasa's next turn.

traits.name: Agile
entries: The rat doesn't provoke Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage.

traits.name: Mimicry
entries: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a whisper or chitter. A hearer can discern the sounds are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.

actions.name: Beak
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage.

name: Red Dragon Wyrmling
speed: walk 30 ft., climb 30 ft., fly 60 ft.
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 24 (7d6) Fire damage. *Success:* Half damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: The slaad regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Points.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The slaad makes three Injecting Claw attacks.

actions.name: Injecting Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Humanoid not cursed by a slaad, it is subjected to the following effect. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 14. *Failure:* The target is cursed unawares, and a minuscule slaad egg is implanted in it. Removing the curse destroys the egg.

Over 2d4 × 10 days, the egg gestates. In the final 24 hours, the cursed target feels unwell; its Speed is halved, and it has Disadvantage on D20 Test. At the end of this time, the egg turns into a Slaad Tadpole, which chews out of the host and kills it.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The shark has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the shark's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Water Breathing
entries: The shark can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (2d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

name: Remorhaz
senses: Darkvision 60 ft., Tremorsense 60 ft., passive Perception 10

traits.name: Heat Aura
entries: At the end of each of the remorhaz's turns, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the remorhaz takes 16 (3d10) Fire damage.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +11, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 18 (2d10 + 7) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Fire damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 17), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

bonusActions.name: Swallow
entries: *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 19, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the remorhaz (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). *Failure:* The target is swallowed by the remorhaz, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, it has Cover against attacks and other effects outside the remorhaz, and it takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage at the start of each of the remorhaz's turns.

If the remorhaz takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the remorhaz must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the remorhaz and has the Prone condition. If the remorhaz dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: The revenant regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. If the revenant takes Fire or Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. Its body is destroyed only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the revenant dies, it revives 24 hours later in a different body unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its corpse. If it revives, it animates a Humanoid corpse elsewhere on the same plane of existence; it now looks different but uses the same stat block and returns with all its Hit Points.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The revenant uses Vengeful Glare and makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Vengeful Glare
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 15, one creature the revenant can see within 30 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Frightened condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. If the Frightened target is cursed by the revenant (see Vow of Revenge), the target also has the Paralyzed condition for the duration.

bonusActions.name: Vow of Revenge (1/Day)
entries: The revenant curses one creature it can see within 30 feet of itself. The revenant knows the distance to and direction of the cursed target, even if it is on a different plane of existence. The curse ends on the target if the revenant uses this Bonus Action on a different creature.

actions.name: Gore
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage. If target is a Large or smaller creature and the rhinoceros moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Hooves
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The roc makes two Beak attacks. It can replace one attack with a Talons attack.

actions.name: Beak
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +13, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 28 (3d12 + 9) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Talons
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +13, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 23 (4d6 + 9) Slashing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 19) from both talons, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

bonusActions.name: Swoop 5
entries: If the roc has a creature Grappled, the roc flies up to half its Fly Speed without provoking Opportunity Attack and drops that creature.

traits.name: Spider Climb
entries: The roper can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The roper makes two Tentacle attacks, uses Reel, and makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 17 (3d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Tentacle
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 60 ft. *Hit:* The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of six tentacles, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the grapple ends.

The tentacle can be damaged, freeing a creature it has Grappled when destroyed (AC 20, HP 10, Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage). Damaging the tentacle deals no damage to the roper, and a destroyed tentacle regrows at the start of the roper's next turn.

actions.name: Reel
entries: The roper pulls each creature Grappled by it up to 30 feet straight toward it.

traits.name: Iron Scent
entries: The rust monster can pinpoint the location of ferrous metal within 30 feet of itself.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The rust monster makes one Bite attack and uses Antennae twice.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Antennae
entries: The rust monster targets one nonmagical metal object—armor or a weapon—worn or carried by a creature within 5 feet of itself. *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 11, the creature with the object. *Failure:* The object takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers (armor) or to its attack rolls (weapon). Armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10, and a weapon is destroyed if its penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor or weapon.

actions.name: Destroy Metal
entries: The rust monster touches a nonmagical metal object within 5 feet of itself that isn't being worn or carried. The touch destroys a 1-foot Cube [Area of Effect] of the object.

reactions.name: Reflexive Antennae
entries: An attack roll hits the rust monster. {@actResponse The rust monster uses Antennae.

traits.name: Running Leap
entries: With a 10-foot running start, the tiger can Long Jump up to 25 feet.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The tiger makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

bonusActions.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The tiger takes the Disengage or Hide action.

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The sahuagin has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its Hit Points.

traits.name: Limited Amphibiousness
entries: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it must be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating outside water.

traits.name: Shark Telepathy
entries: The sahuagin can magically control sharks within 120 feet of itself, using a special telepathy.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The sahuagin makes three Trident attacks.

actions.name: Trident
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

reactions.name: Fiendish Blood
entries: The sahuagin takes Piercing or Slashing damage. {@actResponse d*Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 14, each creature of the sahuagin's choice in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the sahuagin. *Failure:* 10 (3d6) Acid damage, and the target is cursed until it finishes a Short Rest or Long Rest. While cursed, the target can't benefit from the Invisible condition, its Speed decreases by 10 feet, and all Fiends within 120 feet of the target can sense its location regardless of interposing obstacles.

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The sahuagin has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its Hit Points.

traits.name: Limited Amphibiousness
entries: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it must be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating outside water.

traits.name: Shark Telepathy
entries: The sahuagin can magically control sharks within 120 feet of itself, using a special telepathy.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The sahuagin casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):
At will: Thaumaturgy
2e/day: Hold Person, Tongues

spellcasting.name: Fiendish Aid (2/Day)
entries: The sahuagin casts Bless or Healing Word, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
2/day: Bless, Healing Word

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The sahuagin makes two Spectral Jaws attacks.

actions.name: Spectral Jaws
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d8 + 2) Force damage.

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The sahuagin has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its Hit Points.

traits.name: Limited Amphibiousness
entries: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it must be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating outside water.

traits.name: Shark Telepathy
entries: The sahuagin can magically control sharks within 120 feet of itself, using a special telepathy.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The sahuagin makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

bonusActions.name: Aquatic Charge
entries: The sahuagin swims up to its Swim Speed straight toward an enemy it can see.

traits.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the salamander's turns, each creature of the salamander's choice in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the salamander takes 7 (2d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The salamander makes two Flame Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Constrict.

actions.name: Flame Spear
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. The spear magically returns to the salamander's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Constrict
entries: *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 15, one Large or smaller creature the salamander can see within 10 feet. *Failure:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

traits.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the salamander's turns, each creature of the salamander's choice in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the salamander takes 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

traits.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the salamander's turns, each creature of the salamander's choice in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the salamander takes 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The salamander has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The salamander makes two Flame Trident attacks.

actions.name: Flame Trident
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +12, reach 5 ft. or range 30/90 ft. *Hit:* 16 (2d8 + 7) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Fire damage. The trident magically returns to the salamander's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Inferno Blast 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 18, each creature in a 30-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect] centered on a point the salamander can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 35 (10d6) Fire damage, and the target starts burning, taking 5 (1d10) Fire damage at the start of each of its turns instead of the normal burning damage. The target gains 1 Exhaustion level whenever it takes this burning damage. *Success:* Half damage only.

bonusActions.name: Blazing Movement
entries: The salamander moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attack. During this movement, fire fills a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the salamander. When the Emanation [Area of Effect] enters a creature's space, that creature takes 7 (2d6) Fire damage. A creature can take this damage only once per turn.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The satyr has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Hooves
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the satyr pushes the target up to 10 feet straight away from itself.

actions.name: Mockery
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 12, one creature the satyr can see within 90 feet. *Failure:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Psychic damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The satyr has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The satyr makes three Prance attacks.

actions.name: Prance
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the start of the satyr's next turn.

actions.name: Fey Melody 4
entries: The satyr conjures a charming or frightening song. *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 14, each enemy in a 60-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the satyr. *Failure:* The target is subjected to the song's effect:

- Charming
- Frightening

actions.name: Fearsome Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (2d4 + 1) Slashing damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the scarecrow's next turn.

actions.name: Terrifying Glare
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 11, one creature the scarecrow can see within 30 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Frightened condition until the end of the scarecrow's next turn. While Frightened, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

actions.name: Sting
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The scout makes two attacks, using Shortsword and Longbow in any combination.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 150/600 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The scout makes two attacks, using Shortsword or Longbow in any combination.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage, plus 10 (3d6) Piercing damage if the attack was made with Advantage.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, range 150/600 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage, plus 10 (3d6) Piercing damage if the attack was made with Advantage.

bonusActions.name: Aim
entries: The scout has Advantage on the next attack roll it makes during the current turn.

reactions.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: The scout is hit by an attack roll. {@actResponse The scout halves the damage (round down) it takes from that attack.

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The hag can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Vile Appearance
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 11, any Beast or Humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of the hag and can see the hag's true form. *Failure:* The target has the Frightened condition until the start of its next turn. *Success:* The target is immune to this hag's Vile Appearance for 24 hours.

spellcasting.name: Coven Magic
entries: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 11): Augury, Find Familiar, Identify, Locate Object, Scrying, or Unseen Servant. The hag must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

spellcasting.name: Illusory Appearance
entries: The hag casts Disguise Self, using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13). The spell's duration is 24 hours.
At will: Disguise Self

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Death Glare 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 11, one Frightened creature the hag can see within 30 feet. *Failure:* If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it drops to 0 Hit Points. Otherwise, the target takes 13 (3d8) Psychic damage.

traits.name: Water Breathing
entries: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bubble Dash
entries: While underwater, the seahorse moves up to its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attack.

traits.name: Amorphous
entries: The shadow can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Sunlight Weakness
entries: While in sunlight, the shadow has Disadvantage on D20 Test.

actions.name: Draining Swipe
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score decreases by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces that score to 0. If a Humanoid is slain by this attack, a Shadow rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the shadow takes the Hide action.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the demon dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The demon can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Light Sensitivity
entries: While in Bright Light, the demon has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Umbral Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 16 (3d8 + 3) Psychic damage.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the demon takes the Hide action.

name: Shadow Dragon
speed: walk 40 ft., climb 40 ft., fly 80 ft.
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 21

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Living Shadow
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the dragon has Resistance to damage that isn't Force, Psychic, or Radiant.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the dragon has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Shadow Breath 5
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 17, each creature in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 35 (10d6) Necrotic damage. *Success:* Half damage. *Success or Failure:* A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage dies, and a Shadow rises from the corpse. The shadow is under the dragon's control and shares the dragon's Initiative count but acts immediately after the dragon.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in Dim Light or Darkness, the dragon takes the Hide action.

legendaryActions.name: Pounce
entries: The dragon moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendaryActions.name: Veil of Shadow
entries: The dragon uses Shadow Stealth, and one creature of its choice that it can see within 10 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Lightning Absorption
entries: Whenever the shambling mound is subjected to Lightning damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The shambling mound makes three Charged Tendril attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Engulf.

actions.name: Charged Tendril
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Lightning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the shambling mound pulls the target 5 feet straight toward itself.

actions.name: Engulf
entries: *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 15, one Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet. *Failure:* The target is pulled into the shambling mound's space and has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14). Until the grapple ends, the target has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it takes 10 (3d6) Lightning damage at the start of each of its turns. When the shambling mound moves, the Grappled target moves with it, costing it no extra movement. The shambling mound can have only one creature Grappled by this action at a time.

name: Shield Guardian
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 10
languages: understands commands given in any language but can't speak

traits.name: Bound
entries: The guardian is magically bound to an amulet. While the guardian and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the guardian to travel to it, and the guardian knows the distance and direction to the amulet. If the guardian is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (round up) is transferred to the guardian.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: The guardian regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Points.

traits.name: Spell Storing
entries: A spellcaster who wears the guardian's amulet can cause the guardian to store one spell of level 4 or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian while within 5 feet of it. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian. Any previously stored spell is lost when a new spell is stored. The guardian can cast the spell stored with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no spell components and using the caster's spellcasting ability. The stored spell is then lost.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The guardian makes two Fist attacks.

actions.name: Fist
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Force damage.

reactions.name: Protection
entries: An attack roll hits the wearer of the guardian's amulet while the wearer is within 5 feet of the guardian. {@actResponse The wearer gains a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack and possibly causing it to miss, until the start of the guardian's next turn.

reactions.name: Shriek
entries: A creature or a source of Bright Light moves within 30 feet of the shrieker. {@actResponse The shrieker emits a shriek audible within 300 feet of itself for 1 minute or until the shrieker dies.

name: Silver Dragon Wyrmling
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 9 (1d10 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Cold Breath 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 18 (4d8) Cold damage. *Success:* Half damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Breath
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure 1:* The target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn, when it repeats the save. *Failure 2:* The target has the Paralyzed condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

name: Skeleton
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, range 80/320 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Death Burst
entries: The mephit explodes when it dies. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 11, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the mephit. *Failure:* The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Cinder Breath
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 11, one creature the mephit can see within 15 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Blinded condition until the end of the mephit's next turn.

traits.name: Divine Awareness
entries: The solar knows if it hears a lie.

traits.name: Exalted Restoration
entries: If the solar dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the solar fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The solar has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The solar casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 25):
At will: Detect Evil and Good
1e/day: Commune, Control Weather, Dispel Evil and Good, Resurrection

spellcasting.name: Divine Aid (3/Day)
entries: The solar casts Cure Wounds (level 2 version), Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Cure Wounds (level 2 version), Lesser Restoration, Remove Curse

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The solar makes two Flying Sword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Slaying Bow.

actions.name: Flying Sword
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +15, reach 10 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 22 (4d6 + 8) Slashing damage plus 36 (8d8) Radiant damage. The sword magically returns to the solar's hand or hovers within 5 feet of the solar immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Slaying Bow
entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 21, one creature the solar can see within 600 feet. *Failure:* If the creature has 100 Hit Points or fewer, it dies. It otherwise takes 24 (4d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 36 (8d8) Radiant damage.

legendaryActions.name: Blinding Gaze
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 25, one creature the solar can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Blinded condition for 1 minute. *Success or Failure:* The solar can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Radiant Teleport
entries: The solar teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 25, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the solar at its destination space. *Failure:* 11 (2d10) Radiant damage. *Success:* Half damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The spectator uses Eye Rays twice.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Eye Rays
entries: The spectator randomly shoots one of the following magical rays at a target it can see within 90 feet of itself (roll 1d4; reroll if the spectator has already used that ray during this turn):

- 1: Confusion Ray
- 2: Paralyzing Ray
- 3: Fear Ray
- 4: Wounding Ray

reactions.name: Spell Reflection
entries: The spectator succeeds on a saving throw against a spell, or a spell's attack roll misses it. {@actResponse d*Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 12, one creature the spectator can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 10 (3d6) Force damage.

name: Specter
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the specter has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Life Drain
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, its Hit Points maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

traits.name: Inscrutable
entries: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the sphinx fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Detect Magic, Identify, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion, Prestidigitation
1e/day: Dispel Magic, Legend Lore, Locate Object, Plane Shift, Remove Curse, Tongues

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The sphinx makes three Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +8, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (3d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Mind-Rending Roar 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 16, each enemy in a 300-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the sphinx. *Failure:* 35 (10d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Incapacitated condition until the start of the sphinx's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Arcane Prowl
entries: The sphinx can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one Claw attack.

legendaryActions.name: Weight of Years
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature the sphinx can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* The target gains 1 Exhaustion level. While the target has any Exhaustion levels, it appears 3d10 years older. *Success or Failure:* The sphinx can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Inscrutable
entries: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The sphinx has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Detect Magic, Identify, Prestidigitation
1e/day: Locate Object, Remove Curse

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The sphinx makes three Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Curses of the Riddle.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Curse of the Riddle
entries: *Intelligence Saving Throw:* DC 15, one creature the sphinx can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* 21 (6d6) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed with a riddle. The cursed target has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls. In addition, if it takes the Magic action, it must succeed on a DC 15 Intelligence saving throw or that action is wasted. The cursed target can take a Study action to make a DC 15 Intelligence check, solving the riddle and ending the curse on a success. The curse ends early if the sphinx curses another target.

traits.name: Inscrutable
entries: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the sphinx fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):
At will: Detect Evil and Good, Thaumaturgy
1e/day: Detect Magic, Dispel Magic, Greater Restoration, Heroes' Feast, Zone of Truth

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The sphinx makes two Claw attacks and uses Roar.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +12, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 20 (4d6 + 6) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Roar (3/Day)
entries: The sphinx emits a magical roar. Whenever it roars, the roar has a different effect, as detailed below (the sequence resets when it takes a Long Rest):

- First Roar
- Second Roar
- Third Roar

legendaryActions.name: Arcane Prowl
entries: The sphinx can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one Claw attack.

legendaryActions.name: Weight of Years
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature the sphinx can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* The target gains 1 Exhaustion level. While the target has any Exhaustion levels, it appears 3d10 years older. *Success or Failure:* The sphinx can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The sphinx has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Rend
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.

reactions.name: Burst of Ingenuity (2/Day)
entries: The sphinx or another creature within 30 feet makes an ability check or a saving throw. {@actResponse The sphinx adds 2 to the roll.

traits.name: Spider Climb
entries: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Walker
entries: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the spider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

name: Spined Devil
senses: Darkvision 120 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness), passive Perception 12

traits.name: Flyby
entries: The devil doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes two attacks, using Infernal Fork and Tail Spine in any combination.

actions.name: Infernal Fork
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Tail Spine
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 20/80 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

traits.name: Fiendish Restoration

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting

At will: Detect Magic, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion, Water Breathing
2e/day: Detect Thoughts, Dimension Door, Hold Person (level 3 version), Lightning Bolt (level 4 version)

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The naga makes three attacks, using Bite or Necrotic Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Necrotic Ray
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, range 60 ft. *Hit:* 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage.

spellcasting.name: Invisibility
entries: The sprite casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
At will: Invisibility

actions.name: Needle Sword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Enchanting Bow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, range 40/160 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the start of the sprite's next turn.

actions.name: Heart Sight
entries: *Charisma Saving Throw:* DC 10, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see (Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save). *Failure:* The sprite knows the target's emotions and alignment.

name: Spy
skills: deception: +5, insight: +4, investigation: +5, perception: +6, sleight of hand: +4, stealth: +6

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

bonusActions.name: Cunning Action
entries: The spy takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

name: Spy Master
skills: deception: +7, insight: +7, investigation: +8, perception: +11, sleight of hand: +9, stealth: +13

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The spy makes three attacks, using Rapier or Hand Crossbow in any combination.

actions.name: Rapier
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +9, range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Poison damage.

actions.name: Smoke Bomb (1/Day)
entries: The spy throws a bomb to a point it can see within 30 feet of itself. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 16, each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect] centered on that point. *Failure:* 28 (8d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Blinded condition until the end of the spy's next turn. *Success:* Half damage only.

bonusActions.name: Cunning Action
entries: The spy takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

traits.name: Blurred Form
entries: Attack rolls against the mephit are made with Disadvantage unless the mephit has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Death Burst
entries: The mephit explodes when it dies. *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the mephit. *Failure:* 5 (2d4) Fire damage. *Success:* Half damage.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 2 (1d4) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Fire damage.

actions.name: Steam Breath
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. *Failure:* 5 (2d4) Fire damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of the mephit's next turn. *Success:* Half damage only. *Success or Failure:* Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

actions.name: Proboscis
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage, and the stirge attaches to the target. While attached, the stirge can't make Proboscis attacks, and the target takes 5 (2d4) Necrotic damage at the start of each of the stirge's turns.
The stirge can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can detach the stirge as an action.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Stone Club or Boulder in any combination.

actions.name: Stone Club
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 15 ft. *Hit:* 22 (3d10 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Boulder
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +9, range 60/240 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

reactions.name: Deflect Missile 5
entries: The giant is hit by a ranged attack roll and takes Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage from it. {@actResponse The giant reduces the damage it takes from the attack by 11 (1d10 + 6), and if that damage is reduced to 0, the giant can redirect some of the attack's force. *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 17, one creature the giant can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* 11 (1d10 + 6) Force damage.

name: Stone Golem
languages: understands Common plus two other languages but can't speak

traits.name: Immutable Form
entries: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Slow 5
entries: The golem casts the Slow spell, requiring no spell components and using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

actions.name: Multiattack

actions.name: Slam
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) Force damage.

actions.name: Force Bolt
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +9, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 22 (4d10) Force damage.

name: Storm Giant
speed: walk 50 ft., fly 25 ft. (hover) (hover), swim 50 ft.
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., Truesight 30 ft., passive Perception 20

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The giant can breathe air and water.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting

At will: Detect Magic, Light
1/day: Control Weather

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Storm Sword or Thunderbolt in any combination.

actions.name: Storm Sword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +14, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 23 (4d6 + 9) Slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) Lightning damage.

actions.name: Thunderbolt
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +14, range 500 ft. *Hit:* 22 (2d12 + 9) Lightning damage, and the target has the Blinded and Deafened conditions until the start of the giant's next turn.

entries: *Dexterity Saving Throw:* DC 18, each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder [Area of Effect] originating from a point the giant can see within 500 feet. *Failure:* 55 (10d10) Lightning damage. *Success:* Half damage.

traits.name: Incubus Form
entries: When the succubus finishes a Long Rest, it can shape-shift into an Incubus, using that stat block instead of this one.

entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 16 (2d10 + 5) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Charm

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The succubus shape-shifts to resemble a Medium or Small Humanoid or back into its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except its Fly Speed is available only in its true form. Any equipment it's wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny bat. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

While Poisoned, the target can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both, and it can't take Reactions.
